recovery_guidance.details: The tests expect exclusive creation under LAUNCHDECK_HOME/locks, LockRecord owner metadata, bounded wait busy errors, conservative stale takeover rules, and release cleanup on callback success or failure.

covered_behaviors: exclusive lock creation writes locks/<name>.lock under LAUNCHDECK_HOME
LockRecord metadata includes lockName, ownerPid, ownerCommand, ownerCwd, createdAt, expiresAt, and supplied transactionId
bounded wait timeout returns lock_busy/task_lock_busy style actionable error data with safe owner metadata and next actions
expired lock held by a live owner fails closed
expired lock with absent owner can be safely taken over
withLock removes lock files after critical section completion
withLock removes lock files after critical section failure
